positive: A stylized, minimalist woodland creature scene featuring a fox and a raven, rendered in a modern linocut illustration style. The fox is depicted with elegant, strong silhouettes, crouching lightly among stylized grasses and roots. The raven is perched on a branch above, its wings slightly open, suggesting motion. Composition is perfectly centered, using strong contrast between solid blacks and creamy off-white backgrounds. Incorporate subtle, decorative floral elements like ferns and stylized leaves that frame the main subjects without cluttering the design. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, muted forest green, and charcoal black. Studio lighting, high contrast, perfect for apparel printing, vector graphic aesthetic, clean linework.
